comment: And we are done here.  Was great fun watching the stats roll in again.  Happy with some parts of my team, not some others, ahhh its all good fun.

Yeah, it was mostly thru creating a database for each team match up, and entering scores off the fixtures each year from the poolroom. | I had previously done up to end 2014, but thought I should finish it. took a bit | Anyway, happy 70th win to the Cheetahs!
